description: SVG chart component with progressive enhancement: semantic table → CSS chart → SVG chart.

attributes.name: data-config
attributes.description: Chart config overrides as JSON string

attributes.name: data-palette
attributes.description: Custom color palette as JSON array

attributes.name: data-chart
attributes.description: How to handle source table: replace hides table, enhance keeps both

structure.description: Optional source table — data is extracted and table becomes screen-reader accessible

childAttributes.name: data-chart-series
childAttributes.description: Mark this column as a data series for chart extraction

childAttributes.name: data-chart-label
childAttributes.description: Mark this column as the label/category axis

childAttributes.name: data-chart-ignore
childAttributes.description: Exclude this column from chart data extraction

events.name: chart-wc:render
events.description: Fired after SVG chart renders successfully
